title: Hiring Production Engineer at Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions!
